03  ·  THE GAP | SOCIAL MEDIA

Outstanding content.
The algorithm is not distributing it.

PSI has the production quality. What is missing is the distribution system.

23.6KIG FollowersLow for 18-year brokerage
~28Followers / PostBelow industry benchmark
1-2%Engagement RateTarget should be 5%+
850Posts PublishedHigh volume, low distribution

OTHER PLATFORMS

YOUTUBELow activity, minimal subscribers. Untapped video SEO opportunity.
TIKTOKActive account with growing following. Short-form real estate content performing well.
FACEBOOKActive page. Engagement and content strategy can be amplified.
LINKEDINPSI company page active. Corporate and recruitment content present.
X (TWITTER)PSI account present. Minimal engagement, opportunity to build authority.

WHAT IS HOLDING GROWTH BACK

  • No hook strategy. 70% of viewers scroll past in the first 3 seconds without a strong opening.
  • No cross-platform system. Content is created once, posted once. Same content can reach 5x the audience.
  • No trending audio leverage. Missing trending sounds means 3-5x less algorithmic reach on every Reel.
  • No engagement architecture. No polls, no comment-bait, no save-worthy formats. The signals the algorithm needs are not there.

04  ·  THE GAP | WEBSITE & CONVERSION

Brand score: 82.
Conversion score: 52.

The website structure is not set up to bridge the two.

CONVERSION | 52 / 100

Six different CTAs on the homepage create decision paralysis. Visitors do not know what to do, so they leave. No WhatsApp button. No clear buyer journey (Buy / Sell / Invest).

CONTENT | 62 / 100

The homepage headline reads 'YOUR TRUSTED Real Estate PARTNER', a phrase that could belong to any brokerage. PSI's Aldar number 1 credential is buried in slide 4 of a carousel nobody reaches.

SEO | 58 / 100

Key pages on the website are not being indexed by search engines due to how the site is built. An estimated 30-50% of content is invisible to Google.

CONSISTENCY

The homepage shows 12 branches and 700 employees. The About page shows 17 branches and 1,500 professionals. Conflicting numbers erode trust.

~100% qualified leads if the NUHAI strategy is used correctly
